laws.title: HTTPS Encryption
laws.description: All data transmitted should be encrypted to protect user information.
laws.remediation: Ensure all web pages and assets are served over HTTPS.

laws.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
laws.description: Prevent malicious scripts from being injected into web pages viewed by other users.
laws.remediation: Implement content security policy (CSP) headers and sanitize user inputs.

laws.title: User Authentication
laws.description: Strong authentication measures should be in place to verify user identity.
laws.remediation: Incorporate multi-factor authentication (MFA) and password strength checks.

laws.title: Session Management
laws.description: Proper management of user sessions to prevent hijacking or leakage of session information.
laws.remediation: Use secure, HttpOnly cookies and implement session timeouts.

laws.title: Regular Security Updates
laws.description: Ensure that all software and libraries used are up-to-date with the latest security patches.
laws.remediation: Set up a regular audit schedule for monitoring dependencies and apply updates swiftly.
